name: skills_invoked_dry_run
description: Demonstrates skills_invoked. Dry-run only because skills are agent-specific surfaces (Claude Code skills under .claude/skills/, Cursor skills under .cursor/skills/, etc.) and aren't installed by default. To enable: install or vendor a skill named 'review' (or change the expected name), trigger the agent to invoke it, then drop --dry-run.

turns.message: Use the 'review' skill to review the file pyproject.toml.
